0.text: Patchy consolidations with ground-glass opacities in the upper lobes of both lungs

1.text: Patchy consolidations with ground-glass opacities in the middle lobe of the right lung

2.text: Patchy consolidations with ground-glass opacities in the lingular segment of the left lung

3.text: Diffuse nodular ground-glass opacities in the lower lobe basal segments of both lungs
